Container.Name: Delamain
Container.Overview: Delamain is a self-hosted AI vehicle companion modeled on Delamain from Cyberpunk 2077. It integrates with sunnypilot on Comma hardware (Comma 4 / Comma 3X) to deliver real-time voice commentary, driving event alerts, navigation, web search, and a full telemetry dashboard — all through a cyber-themed web interface. Voice is powered by F5-TTS with a cloned voice. Delamain speaks when you brake hard, when the car ahead is too close, when you are speeding — and unprompted after 30 minutes of silence on a long drive. Requires a running llama.cpp server or any OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint. F5-TTS model weights and a voice reference audio file must be supplied by the user (see GitHub for details).
Container.Requires: Requires a running llama.cpp server or OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint. F5-TTS model weights must be downloaded separately (see GitHub README). An NVIDIA GPU is strongly recommended for real-time TTS; CPU-only is supported but slower on uncached phrases.

Config.Name: Backend API Port
Config.Description: Delamain backend API and WebSocket port.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database, audio output cache, and reference audio file. Place your delamain_ref_10s.wav here.

Config.Name: F5-TTS Model Weights
Config.Description: Path to F5-TTS model weights directory. Must contain F5TTS_Base/model_1200000.pt and F5TTS_Base/vocab.txt. Download with: huggingface-cli download SWivid/F5-TTS F5TTS_Base/model_1200000.pt F5TTS_Base/vocab.txt --local-dir /path/to/checkpoints

Config.Name: LLM URL
Config.Description: URL of your llama.cpp or OpenAI-compatible LLM server. Use your server's LAN IP — not localhost (that resolves inside the container).

Config.Name: SearXNG URL
Config.Description: Optional: URL of a SearXNG instance for live web search (weather, traffic, news). Leave blank to disable. Example: http://192.168.1.x:8887/search

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed to connect to the backend. Include your domain if accessing over the internet. Example: https://delamain.example.com,http://192.168.1.x:5173

Config.Name: NVIDIA GPU (optional)
Config.Description: Set to 'all' to enable NVIDIA GPU passthrough for F5-TTS acceleration. Requires Nvidia-Driver plugin installed in Unraid. Leave blank for CPU-only.
